tips_en: Read the World Models paper first as it provides the most comprehensive framework and contextualizes the other two works; the document parsing paper offers a transferable data-centric methodology that could enhance world model training, while the KV cache compression technique directly addresses computational efficiency needed for complex world models with long-context reasoning.
tips_zh: 建议首先阅读World Models论文，因为它提供了最全面的框架并能帮助理解其他两篇工作的背景；文档解析论文提供了可迁移的数据中心化方法论，可能用于改进世界模型的训练；而KV缓存压缩技术则直接解决了复杂世界模型在长上下文推理中所需的计算效率问题。
